Brief: Consider forage impacts on predator productivity when setting catch limits
ProposedInd: Forage stock abundance and dynamics for important forage by FMP (Appendix A)
CurrentInd: Forage fish (menhaden) abundance and estuarine crab and shrimp landings
PotentialInd: Add food web estimated trends for aggregate forage
Feasibility: High: use current food web model

Brief: Classify important prey as ecosystem component species

CurrentInd: Average percent prey in diet by FMP (Appendix A)
PotentialInd: Diet analysis to estimate prey mass, occurrence, and degree of overlap among multiple predators
Feasibility: Unknown, dependent on quality of existing food habits data

Brief: Consider food web targets and thresholds for management action
Feasibility: High: use current food web model

Brief: Account for migratory species interactions across otherwise separate food webs
PotentialInd: Potentially from spatial food web model
Feasibility: Moderate: requires spatial update to food web model

Brief: Maintain diverse (bottom up and top down) energy pathways
Feasibility: High: use current food web model

Brief: Use food web models in multiple decision contexts where appropriate

Brief: Definition: otherwise unmanaged species important to achieving ecosystem management objectives
Account for invasive species impacts in management actions

Brief: Consider human health and food web impacts
